examples: The rise of fast-food restaurants after the Second World War produced a society full of cheap, industrially made foodstuffs.
The unusually high mortality rate among dolphin calves in the industrially contaminated waters along Florida's Gulf Coast is probably the result of their being poisoned by their mother's milk.
We should run all undertakings industrially and thriftily.
Prefabrication and standardized, industrially produced housing were the accepted solution for these social problems.
Allylix has duplicated the smell of sandalwood industrially, by extracting the genes for the relevant enzymes from sandalwood trees.
